chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1122 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For Hearing of CMA 4557/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 30-07-2027 Mr. Amjad Ali Almani, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG and Ghulam Abbas Kubar Assistant A.G a/w SIP/I.O Ghulam Asghar of P.S, Ahmedpur and SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP, Khairpur. ***** Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and I.O of the case, taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to counsel for the petitioners. Investigating Officer is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 who has reiterated her freewill marriage with petitioner No.2 and therefore he will file a report before the concerned Magistrate disposing of the case under C-class. Upon receipt of case papers/report, the Magistrate shall pass an appropriate order on such report within 15-days time. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. Official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners, as and when required. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
